reviews.review_description: I use to love going into Horizon Workrooms to share my computer screen and network with other people. But when they slowly took it all away I was looking for an app to replace it but no other app felt rite to me. But this app rite here built by someone that I highly look up to is where I want to be. He is constantly working on building this app out with updates, and I’m looking forward to watching this app grow… ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️🤩
